steps.name: create-branch
steps.description: Create the task worktree and branch, populate step_tracker.json with the planned step list.

steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify the task has no dependencies (per task.json).

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create the standard task folder structure (assets, results, code, plan, research, intervention, corrections).

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: this is a focused re-run of an established pipeline; relevant prior literature was already covered in t0009/t0014.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: no external knowledge needed; the pipeline reuses claude CLI with the same models.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review t0009 and t0014 annotator/judge code to confirm exactly how to insert the 1500-char truncation in both annotator and judge prompts.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Plan the implementation: paths.py, constants.py with truncation, v2_truncated_annotator.py, v2_truncated_judge.py, compute_stats.py for 3-way comparison and decomposition with Wilson 95% CIs.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: all calls run locally via the claude CLI; no remote compute required.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Run haiku annotator on the t0014 pool with 1500-char truncated problems, then haiku judge with 1500-char truncated problems. Build the predictions asset; compute the decomposition.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: this is a tightly scoped ablation; the experimental design is fixed by the task description.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: comparison is internal across three project conditions; Xiong2024 framing was already discussed in t0009/t0014.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write metrics.json with three variants (v1-flat-truncated, v2-tree-truncated, v2-tree-full), Wilson 95% CIs, decomposition table in results_detailed.md, and at least two charts.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up suggestions based on the decomposition outcome.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Final pre-PR verifications: asset verificators, verify_task_complete, verify_pr_premerge.
